title: ジャパンカップの後に・執事なき激戦

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Tamamo Cross! Tamamo Cross has done
it again! After dominating the autumn Tenno Sho,
she's taken the Japan Cup, too!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
In the clash between the Beast and White
Lightning, victory goes to White Lightning! And
the thunderous applause following her only
amplify her victory!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing... The president was right—this
race really was one for the books.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: F-fate really did lead her to v-victory... Hic... Tamamo, Oguri... Congrats on an amazing raaaaace!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, Oguri... Didja see that?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Tama... You've gotten even stronger... so much
stronger...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it... It's like you don't have a single
weakness...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Course I don't. Who do ya think you're dealin'
with?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm Tamamo Cross, the Lightning of Naniwa.
Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But this isn't over. Not by a long shot. Our next
match is the real showdown.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna need ya to come to the Arima Kinen in
tip-top shape! Don't go lettin' me down with some
lousy performance!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, I'll be ready. Next time, I'm winning.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And thank you, Tama. This was... so much fun. And it'll be even more fun when I win!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I gotta thank ya for today, Trainer. Hahaha... See,
I told ya, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If I put my all into preppin', I can take on any
race... Just gotta forgot 'bout what comes before
or after.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Anyways, now we got just one more race to go.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine. C'mon, crack a smile or somethin', would
ya? I just won a race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What was Oguri sayin' just now? That I got no
weaknesses? ...That girl needs her eyes checked.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Seriously. Dunno how she's so blind, but she can
match my pace no sweat, no matter the distance.
It's freakin' scary...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But Trainer, y'know...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Racin' totally rocks. I'm havin' a blast here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I wanna keep runnin' like this forever. With Oguri,
forever...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And wouldn't it be awesome if I kept on winnin'
too?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Still, I know that's a pipe dream. But that's what
makes it fun, and what gets me all fired up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I owe my body some thanks for holdin' up
today...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm almost there... Just a little longer! I'm gonna
keep blazin' through, right till the end!
